title: taraxacum nemorum
intro: Taraxacum nemorum, also known as woodland dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum nemorum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support liver function, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Taraxacum nemorum can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for different methods of consumption and use in traditional medicine.
